maintenance.after_every_run: Update the selected item's durable status and evidence; do not reprioritize unrelated items mechanically.
maintenance.after_deployment: Record a crawl and measurement checkpoint. On a new or low-signal URL, do not block high-confidence usefulness, factual, or technical improvements unless an action contract explicitly requires an isolated experiment and the evidence can support that evaluation.
maintenance.weekly: Re-score ready and planned items from fresh GSC, public health, experiment, product, and authority evidence.
maintenance.monthly_or_strategy_event: Ask the user to confirm material destination expansion, monetization direction, risk changes, or site continuation decisions.

goals: Validate relevant organic demand before scaling destination count.
Finish San Diego as the first deep, differentiated family-planning cluster.
Create a repeatable loop from evidence to one reviewed experiment to observation to keep/iterate/stop.
Build useful tools and source-worthy assets rather than generic travel prose.

No indexing request, affiliate CTA, outreach, external-account mutation, custom-map mutation, separate resorts URL, or recurring automation.
